_title: GoCityQuest - Urban Team Building Adventures for Companies
hero_title: Transform Team Building Into an Urban Adventure
hero_text: Get your team out of the conference room and into the city. GoCityQuest creates guided cultural explorations that build genuine connections, spark curiosity, and keep your people moving.
whatwedo_subtitle: We design city-wide quests that turn historic streets into team challenges. No trust falls. No awkward icebreakers. Just real exploration, real problem-solving, and real conversation.
feat1_text: Your team navigates through historic landmarks, hidden courtyards, and local gems. Every stop reveals a story — and a challenge that demands collaboration.
feat2_text: Walking side by side, solving problems together, discovering something new — these shared experiences create the kind of trust that no workshop can replicate.
feat3_text: Real-time dashboards, multi-team support, custom scenarios, branded experiences. Built for companies that expect professional execution at any scale.
concepts_subtitle: We design programs that break the routine and spark creative inspiration through history, culture, and literature. Each concept is an original scenario built around a big idea.
concept1_text: Behind the facade of grand balls and magnificent mansions lies a chilling history of enigmatic secrets and supernatural phenomena that most residents have never heard of. We invite you into this world — if only for a little while.
concept2_text: The streets of Petersburg remember the footsteps of revolutionaries, the whispers of conspirators, and the roar of upheavals. Behind textbook paragraphs lie the dramas of people whose decisions shook an Empire. The Northern Capital is not a museum — it's a historical stage.
concept3_text: Visit the filming locations of the legendary movie, see how they've changed since 1997, discover fascinating facts about the film, feel its spirit, and understand: what is its power in the 21st century!
why_title: Your Team Deserves Better Than Another Meeting Room
why_subtitle: Team building should feel like an investment, not a chore. Here's why leading companies choose outdoor cultural quests over traditional activities.
why1_text: Research consistently shows that walking boosts creative thinking by up to 60%. Your team spends the day outdoors, moving through the city, energised by the environment rather than drained by fluorescent lights. It's a genuine investment in your employees' wellbeing — and they'll feel the difference.
why2_text: Every quest is built around real history, architecture, and local stories. Your team doesn't just visit landmarks — they uncover the hidden layers of a city. From medieval trade routes to art deco facades, each stage brings context that makes the place come alive.
why3_text: The best team bonding happens naturally — when people share a challenge, celebrate a discovery, or get lost together and find their way back. GoCityQuest creates the conditions for authentic interaction, not scripted group activities that everyone endures politely.
why4_text: We've been designing team experiences since before "team building" became a buzzword. Two decades of working with companies of every size — from startups to Fortune 500 — means we know what works, what doesn't, and how to deliver consistently at scale.
how_title: From Booking to Celebration in Four Steps
how_subtitle: We handle the complexity so you don't have to. Every quest is turnkey — just show up and explore.
step1_text: Tell us the city, group size, and vibe you're after. We craft a custom route through the best cultural landmarks, with challenges tailored to your team.
step2_text: Each team receives a unique QR code or join link. No app downloads, no accounts — just scan and go from any smartphone browser.
step3_text: Teams navigate the city at their own pace. At each landmark they unlock clues, answer questions, and earn points. A live leaderboard keeps the competitive spirit alive.
step4_text: After the quest, gather to compare stories, review the scoreboard, and recognise the winning team. The shared adventure gives everyone something real to talk about.
ent_title: Built for Companies That Take Culture Seriously
ent_subtitle: GoCityQuest is not a toy. It's a professional-grade platform designed for corporate use at any scale.
ent_feats: — tailored routes and challenges for your city and team goals
— run dozens of teams simultaneously with real-time tracking
— monitor every team's progress as it happens
— your company's identity woven into the quest
— works in any mobile browser, zero friction for participants
— a single point of contact from planning to debrief
— quests in any language your team speaks
test_subtitle: Companies that invest in their people choose GoCityQuest for results that last beyond the event.
test1_quote: "Our team came back from the quest more energised than any offsite we've done. People who'd never spoken were suddenly collaborating. It changed the dynamic of our entire department."
test2_quote: "We run GoCityQuest for every new cohort of hires. It's become our signature onboarding experience. The cultural context makes it memorable in a way that workshops simply aren't."
test3_quote: "I was skeptical — our team is not the 'fun activities' type. But the quest was genuinely engaging. The historical challenges were smart, the competition was fierce, and everyone asked when we're doing it again."
cta_title: Ready to Get Your Team Moving?
cta_text: Let's design a quest your team will talk about for years.
contact_title: Let's Plan Your Next Team Adventure
contact_subtitle: Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal for your team.
